languages.text: "Я чуть было не подумал, что вы напрашиваетесь на казнь. Прошу, впредь избегайте подобных острот".

traits.locale_text: "Я чуть было не подумал, что вы напрашиваетесь на казнь. Прошу, впредь избегайте подобных острот".

languages.text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."
languages.original_text: "Я чуть было не подумал, что вы напрашиваетесь на казнь. Прошу, впредь избегайте подобных острот".

traits.locale_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."
"I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."
"I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

languages.text: “我差点以为你是来找死的。往后可别开这种玩笑了。”
languages.original_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

traits.locale_text: “我差点以为你是来找死的。往后可别开这种玩笑了。”

languages.text: « J'ai bien cru que vous cherchiez à vous faire exécuter. À l'avenir, je vous saurais gré de bien vouloir m'épargner vos traits d'esprit. »
languages.original_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai bien cru que vous cherchiez à vous faire exécuter. À l'avenir, je vous saurais gré de bien vouloir m'épargner vos traits d'esprit. »

languages.text: "Az daha idam edilmeye bahane aradığını düşünecektim. Gelecekte bu tür nüktelerden kaçınmanı öneririm."
languages.original_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

traits.locale_text: "Az daha idam edilmeye bahane aradığını düşünecektim. Gelecekte bu tür nüktelerden kaçınmanı öneririm."

languages.text: «Casi pensaba que quería que le ejecutaran. En un futuro, ahórrese esos comentarios».
languages.original_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

traits.locale_text: «Casi pensaba que quería que le ejecutaran. En un futuro, ahórrese esos comentarios».

languages.text: "Ich dachte schon, Ihr wollt exekutiert werden. Bitte spart Euch derartige Witzeleien in Zukunft."
languages.original_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

traits.locale_text: "Ich dachte schon, Ihr wollt exekutiert werden. Bitte spart Euch derartige Witzeleien in Zukunft."

languages.text: 「お前は処刑されることを望んでいるのかと思ったよ。今後、そのようなジョークは避けてくれ。」
languages.original_text: "I almost thought you were angling to be executed. Please avoid such quips in the future."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は処刑されることを望んでいるのかと思ったよ。今後、そのようなジョークは避けてくれ。」
